questionHtml: Identify each compound from the spectra given, use absorptions from the range of 1700 cm−1 to 3500 cm−1. Explain the reason for your choice, referring to section 26 of the data booklet.
markschemeHtml:
Award [1 max] for correctly identifying all 3 compounds without valid reasons given.

Accept specific values of wavenumbers within each range.
